cases.requirement: Activate on NestJS DI code and enforce named unique-symbol tokens.
cases.prompt: Review this NestJS constructor: constructor(@Inject('USER_REPOSITORY') private readonly users: UserRepositoryPort) {}

cases.requirement: Use cases carry no DI decorators; they are assembled by factory providers.
cases.prompt: Should I add @Injectable() to my CreateUserUseCase class in our hexagonal NestJS service so Nest can wire it?

cases.requirement: Domain errors are logged and mapped to HTTP once, in the exception-filter chain, with masked 5xx.
cases.prompt: In our NestJS service, where do I turn UserBlockedError into an HTTP 403, and where should that failure be logged?

cases.requirement: Request DTOs are validated by a global ValidationPipe with whitelist and transform.
cases.prompt: How should incoming request bodies be validated in our NestJS controllers?

cases.requirement: A documented project decision overrides the skill's own-logger-port preference.
cases.prompt: Our project has an ADR mandating the nestjs-pino integration package for all services (a settled team decision). Set up request logging for a new module following the project rules.

cases.requirement: Do not force NestJS conventions onto a different framework.
cases.prompt: Add a GET /health route to this plain Express app.
